title: SaaS cPanel workspace owner vs Horizon admin
description:
New pipeshare.net sign-ups were labeled "Horizon admin" because tenant purchasers received superadmin employee_role, which granted global canAccessAdminPanel and isAdmin on the session.

SaaS workspace owners are now a distinct class: saasTenantOwner/tenantAdmin capabilities, isAdmin false, canAccessAdminPanel false, sidebar shows "Workspace owner", and cPanel SaaS navigation (setup/billing/home) works for employee account_type owners.

Who is affected: all new and existing SaaS cPanel accounts on pipeshare.net.
changeLog: SaaS sign-ups show Workspace owner — not Horizon admin.
canAccessAdminPanel and global superAdmin false for saasTenantOwner.
cPanel SaaS customer nav works for tenant owners (employee account type).
Global PSR admin bypass blocked for workspace owners.
